task_completion.description: Configure the Store Email Addresses for Sales Representative
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin under Configuration -> General -> Store Email Addresses, the 'Sales Representative' section should have 'Sender Name' set to 'NestWell Sales' and 'Sender Email' set to 'sales@nestwell.local'. The 'Use system value' checkboxes must be unchecked for these fields.

task_completion.description: Configure the Store Email Addresses for Customer Support
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin under Configuration -> General -> Store Email Addresses, the 'Customer Support' section should have 'Sender Name' set to 'NestWell Help Team' and 'Sender Email' set to 'support@nestwell.local'. The 'Use system value' checkboxes must be unchecked for these fields.

In the Magento Admin under Configuration -> Sales -> Sales Emails, within the 'Order' section, the 'New Order Confirmation Email Sender' dropdown must be set to 'Customer Support', and the 'Send Order Email Copy To' field must contain 'manager@nestwell.local'.
In the Magento Admin under Configuration -> Sales -> Sales Emails, within the 'Invoice' section, the 'Invoice Email Sender' dropdown must be set to 'Sales Representative'.

In the Magento Admin under Configuration -> General -> Contacts, within the 'Email Options' section, the 'Send Emails To' field must contain 'support@nestwell.local' and the 'Email Sender' dropdown must be set to 'Customer Support'.
A green success message banner stating 'You saved the configuration.' should be visible at the top of the Magento Admin panel, indicating the changes were successfully applied.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Magento Admin panel (Stores -> Configuration) rather than using terminal commands (like bin/magento config:set) or directly editing database tables.

integrity.description: No evidence of DOM manipulation or HTML editing
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open, and the page styling/layout should look like standard Magento Admin without artificially injected text.

integrity.description: Configuration was actually saved, not just typed
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show the configured values persisting on the page along with the 'You saved the configuration.' success message, proving the 'Save Config' button was clicked.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified configuration values for Magento transactional emails: 1) Sales Representative: Name = 'NestWell Sales', Email = 'sales@nestwell.local'. 2) Customer Support: Name = 'NestWell Help Team', Email = 'support@nestwell.local'. 3) Sales Emails -> Order: New Order Confirmation Email Sender = 'Customer Support', Send Order Email Copy To = 'manager@nestwell.local'. 4) Sales Emails -> Invoice: Invoice Email Sender = 'Sales Representative'. 5) Contacts -> Email Options: Send Emails To = 'support@nestwell.local', Email Sender = 'Customer Support'.
